behavior: The stronger-local macOS package declares its runtime profile, contains no model payload, launches from the mounted image and a copied install, visibly confirms model setup and removal in the installed app, downloads and verifies the exact pinned Qwen3 pair, and removes every governed model file while built-in matching remains available.
revision_scope: The committed stronger-local package contract, bounded binary scanner, command trace coverage, and main-window-parented model lifecycle confirmations through fc165239.

commands.result: Built the arm64 stronger-local no-account DMG without embedding .safetensors payloads.

commands.command: npm run tauri:verify:macos:stronger-local -- --dmg target/aarch64-apple-darwin/release/bundle/dmg/JobSentinel_2.9.5_stronger-local_aarch64_no-account_macos.dmg --expected-architectures arm64 --expected-bundle-id com.jobsentinel.main --expected-product-name JobSentinel --expected-version 2.9.5 --expected-icon-file icon.icns --expected-minimum-system-version 13.0 --launch-smoke --install-smoke --require-checksum
commands.result: Verified checksum, DMG integrity, metadata, stronger-local native commands, absent model payloads, arm64 architecture, code-signing integrity, mounted launch, copied-install launch, private local data, and empty launch stderr.

commands.command: Computer Use installed-app lifecycle against an isolated macOS package-smoke root
commands.result: The rebuilt copied app showed both native confirmation sheets, downloaded the exact governed Qwen3 pair to Ready, then removed it and returned every model group to Not downloaded.

assertions: The package scanner found all six stronger-local commands without spawning an output-buffer-limited strings process.
The installed confirmation sheets were attached to the main app window and named the download and removal consequences before either action.
The installed UI reached Advanced local matching is ready with both governed Qwen3 groups at 7/7 files present.
Removal returned both governed Qwen3 groups to 0/7 and the legacy MiniLM group to 0/3; the governed model root was empty.
The copied installed app used only an isolated package-smoke database and model root.
caveats: The live installed lifecycle ran on one macOS 27 arm64 64 GiB host; it is not exact macOS 26, Windows 11, Linux stronger-local, or modest-hardware download evidence.
The no-account artifact is ad-hoc signed. Gatekeeper rejection is expected until a Developer ID signed and notarized release artifact is available.
The exact model download duration remains network-dependent and is not a release threshold.
